channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 19%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Blair: Labour is playing with fire over UK’s future – and is too weak to rejoin EU
item.description: Blair: Labour is playing with fire over UK’s future – and is too weak to rejoin EU

item.title: BBC Politics: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
item.description: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Tony Blair says Labour must abandon net zero, support Trump and cut benefits
item.description: Tony Blair says Labour must abandon net zero, support Trump and cut benefits

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Tony Blair’s essay on Labour failings gets full marks for being unhelpful
item.description: Tony Blair’s essay on Labour failings gets full marks for being unhelpful

item.title: Sky News Politics: Labour needs 'fundamental reset', says Blair amid leadership crisis
item.description: Labour needs 'fundamental reset', says Blair amid leadership crisis

item.title: The Times: Tony Blair wades into Labour’s battle to replace Keir Starmer - The Times
item.description: Tony Blair wades into Labour’s battle to replace Keir Starmer - The Times

item.title: i Politics: Blair turns on Labour's leadership rivals: Britain is becoming irrelevant
item.description: Blair turns on Labour's leadership rivals: Britain is becoming irrelevant

item.title: ITVX: Swinney dismisses Starmer's claim questions remain after Murrell embezzlement | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Swinney dismisses Starmer's claim questions remain after Murrell embezzlement | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: i Politics: Starmer to ready UK for war with billions in defence spending
item.description: Starmer to ready UK for war with billions in defence spending

item.title: The Guardian: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman - The Guardian
item.description: UK may be ‘tipped into a general election’ if Burnham replaces Starmer, says Harman - The Guardian
